creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

MathJax 2.7.2 was released quite some time ago (2017-08-26). I am using it actively in production since last month, no problems encountered. Could someone please update the port?

--- Makefile.orig	2016-12-05 19:12:12.000000000 +0100
+++ Makefile	2018-01-11 13:40:02.001050000 +0100
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/www/mathjax/Makefile 427912 2016-12-05 18:12:12Z pi $
 
 PORTNAME=	MathJax
-PORTVERSION=	2.7.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.7.2
 CATEGORIES=	www
 
 MAINTAINER=	marko.cupac@mimar.rs


--- distinfo	2018-01-11 13:40:06.261641000 +0100
+++ distinfo.orig	2016-12-05 19:12:12.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1513844994
-SHA256 (mathjax-MathJax-2.7.2_GH0.tar.gz) = c4c321783ff0936f0d5ff4281367401595105cc57d4ecda0bb269277496ce2e4
-SIZE (mathjax-MathJax-2.7.2_GH0.tar.gz) = 25212235
+TIMESTAMP = 1479932338
+SHA256 (mathjax-MathJax-2.7.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 4944dd3995417c7692b64462698054760d38ff72175f66e2f2a007c5031d5927
+SIZE (mathjax-MathJax-2.7.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 24594403
